title: Dungeons Dimensions: Music
description: Music for all Dungeons Dimensions Projects
body:
# Dungeons Dimensions: Music
This is a support Resource Pack for all of My _Dungeons Dimensions_ projects adding music to Minecraft from Minecraft Dungeons!

The pack will also function in vanilla without the _Dungeons Dimensions_ mods if you only want the music

## All Dungeons Dimensions Projects:
[Dungeons Dimensions: Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/dungeons-dimensions-nether)
</br>

Dungeons Dimensions: End [Coming Soon]
</br>

Dungeons Dimensions: Overworld [Coming Less Soon]
### Music Credits:
Peter Hont

Eugnosis

Rostislav Trifonov
